description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The lower portion of the exterior walls is constructed from stone blocks, while the upper section is finished with a tan plaster or stucco. The front facade features a wooden arched door and a single square window with a wooden frame, while the back has a single window and the side opposite the door has two windows. The wooden trim and framing around the windows and door add a rustic touch, and the house sits directly on the ground without visible steps or a porch. The overall design is simple and functional, reminiscent of traditional European or countryside cottages.
description: A small, rustic house with a gable roof, stone lower walls, tan upper walls, and wooden trim. Features an arched wooden door and several square windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched wooden door and a single window with wooden trim.
description_view_1: Side gable view with no windows or doors, highlighting the roof's overhang and wall textures.
description_view_2: Rear view with two square windows symmetrically placed on the wall.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end with a single centered window and visible stone and plaster wall textures.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door with wooden trim, no steps or porch, simple and rustic.
